name: Wrongful Levy Retirement Plan Rollover

eligibility.description: The contribution must be made by the tax return due date (excluding extensions) for the year the money is returned; the original levy must have been determined to be wrongful or premature.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If the IRS returns funds levied from an eligible retirement plan, the individual can contribute the money (plus interest) back into the plan or an IRA, treating it as a tax-free rollover.
